criteria.label: Produce a 2D embedding scatter colored by discrete class labels with legend and method-labeled axes.
criteria.example: On Iris PCA-2D, scatter three species with distinct colors, legend titled "Species", axes "PC1" / "PC2", title includes "PCA".

criteria.label: Apply overplotting mitigation appropriate to dataset size.
criteria.example: For 10k points, set alpha≤0.2 or plot a 5k stratified subsample; state n plotted in the caption.

criteria.label: Encode prediction errors on an embedding for qualitative debugging.
criteria.example: Color by y_true, draw black edge rings on rows where y_pred ≠ y_true; note which class pair dominates errors.

criteria.label: Export coordinates and metadata for reproducible figure regeneration.
criteria.example: Save npz with Z, y_true, optional y_pred plus JSON listing method, random_state, and UMAP n_neighbors/min_dist.

criteria.label: Interpret a visual cluster cautiously and state what quantitative check would follow.
criteria.example: Given a dense unlabeled blob in UMAP-2D, propose checking k-means silhouette across k and comparing to label purity—not asserting k without metrics.
